prompt:
The file apps/agent/src/entities/transcript.tsx is currently broken. read_file it FIRST to see the current state.

Known issues to fix using apply_diff (surgical SEARCH/REPLACE — DO NOT use write_file, that would rewrite the whole file):
1. The line "const messages = props.messages;" references an undefined "props" — it should access messages directly from the Entity render-function argument. The Entity wrapper passes Ui-components as the destructured first argument, NOT a separate props parameter. Refactor: "messages" must come from the same destructure, e.g. Entity(({ Text, Heading, messages }) => ...). Then use "messages()" since it is a Solid Accessor.
2. The bare <div> wrappers won't receive meta correctly. Replace the outer <div> with a Ui-component (look at the Ui list in your prompt — Stack is the vertical-list one).
3. Invented props like size="sm" and inline style={{color:'#888'}} on <Heading> — drop them; use class="text-sm text-muted-foreground" instead (Tailwind classes).

Workflow:
- read_file the file FIRST.
- Plan minimal apply_diff blocks targeting only the broken parts (NOT rewriting the whole file).
- Each search must be unique in the file — include enough context around each block.
- Emit one apply_diff call with all blocks. If it errors due to ambiguous search, retry with more context.
